services.title: Discord query
services.summary: Diff Developer applications vs config per bot token; optional --import from live API (JSON on stdout).

services.title: Discord maintain
services.summary: PATCH managed applications for API-supported fields; print Developer Portal checklist.

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure discord query --` to verify application drift.
Bootstrap: `query -- --import --yes` after bot tokens are in vault.
Enable privileged Gateway Intents in the Discord Developer Portal when query reports portal_checklist items.
